page_summary: A page of mathematical prime factorizations with long numbers, accompanied by a tall vertical black abstract figure on the right side.

decorations.description: A tall vertical black abstract inkblot-like figure running the full height of the page on the right side, with a wider head-like top section, narrowing neck, and an elongated, slightly irregular body with bulges and small detached marks near the bottom.
decorations.position: right side of the page, full height
components: head-like bulb at the top with two small white eye-like voids
elongated body with several bulges and constrictions
two small detached black spots near the lower right
a few small detached strokes at the very bottom

uncertain_or_unreadable: Some exponent digits in the math equations are very small and could be misread (e.g., 3⁵, 3², 2³, 5², 2⁶, 5², 17²) — the superscript numbers are tiny and partially unclear.
